description_long: This is a single, vintage-style lace-up boot made of worn brown leather, featuring a rounded toe and a stitched cap at the front. The upper part of the boot is constructed from soft, slightly creased leather, with visible seams and reinforced stitching along the sides and toe cap. The boot has a side zipper for easy access, in addition to traditional laces that run through metal eyelets up the front. The sole is made of a darker, sturdy material, likely leather or rubber, and shows signs of wear, especially at the heel and toe. The interior appears to be lined with a lighter, softer material for comfort. The overall appearance suggests this boot has seen significant use, with scuff marks, discoloration, and creasing throughout.
description: A worn, brown leather lace-up boot with a side zipper, rounded toe, and visible stitching, showing signs of heavy use and creasing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, laces, and cap-toe stitching, with visible creasing and wear on the leather.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side zipper, seam lines, and the worn, slightly discolored leather surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back seam, heel, and the overall shape of the boot's shaft, with visible wear at the heel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the lacing, stitching details, and the worn, creased leather along the side and sole.
